essence: Supports electromechanical systems by combining mechanical, electrical, and control skills for maintenance and assembly.

identity.title: Mechatronics Technician
identity.summary: Builds, tests, and maintains mechatronic assemblies, sensors, and control systems used across manufacturing and automation.

salary.notes: Technicians with multi‑disciplinary skills are highly employable in advanced factories.

qualifications: Vocational training in mechatronics, electrical, or mechanical engineering
Experience with sensors, actuators, and control systems
Ability to perform mechanical assembly and electrical wiring
Familiarity with diagnostic tools and test equipment

lifestyle.description: Workshop and factory environment with hands‑on assembly, testing, and troubleshooting of integrated systems.
